zh.of Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Montague於大約1317年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu43歲，母親Elizabeth De Montfort46歲。她於大約1339年與Roger BAVANT在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年10月13日之後。

zh-hans.of Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Montague于大约1317年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu43岁，母亲Elizabeth De Montfort46岁。她于大约1339年与Roger BAVANT在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年10月13日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Montague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: McTigue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Taidhg, ‘son of Tadhg’, a personal name originally meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’. Compare McCaig .

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Montague was born about 1317, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, was 43 and her mother, Elizabeth De Montfort, was 46. She married Roger BAVANT about 1339, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 13 October 1361.

Elle a épousé Roger BAVANT environ 1339, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 13 octobre 1361.

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Montague(이)가 대략 1317년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Montfort(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Roger BAVANT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 10월 13일 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Montague родилась около 1317 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Montfort, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger BAVANT около 1339 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 13 октябрь 1361 г.
